descriptionShort: Box score of Richmond Sockeyes defeating Humboldt 5-3 in Centennial Cup Western final playoff game.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Humboldt 5-3 in Game 2 of the Centennial Cup Western final on April 22, 1987, tying the best-of-seven series 1-1. Goals from Czenczek, Phillips (twice), Kozak, and others carried Richmond. The detailed box score includes all penalties, shots on goal (Humboldt 45, Richmond 31), and power-play statistics.

attribution.headline: CENTENNIAL CUP Western final Richmond 5 Humboldt 3
